items.title: AMD, McDonald's, Spotify: Earnings to watch
items.description: A number of big-name companies are set to report earnings this week, including Advanced Micro Devices (AMD), McDonald's (MCD), and Spotify (SPOT). Yahoo Finance Senior Reporters Allie Canal and Brooke DiPalma share what investors need to know heading into the reports. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination.

items.title: McDonald's Q3 Preview: Report Shows Visitor Slump — Can Value Meals, Monopoly Help Guidance?
items.description: McDonald's may have seen a drop in visitors during the third quarter, according to a new report. Here's why investors may be more excited about Q4.

items.title: McDonald's Gears Up to Report Q3 Earnings: Key Factors to Note
items.description: MCD gears up to release Q3 2025 earnings amid inflation and traffic challenges, banking on menu innovation and value deals to sustain growth.
